current_run.problem_name: Hidden Cyclic Bitwise AND of Pairs
current_run.description: Given an N-bit integer 'secret', the function f(x) returns 1 if the bitwise AND of all adjacent pairs of bits in x equals the bitwise AND of all adjacent pairs of bits in 'secret', and 0 otherwise. This function is nonlinear due to the bitwise AND operations on pairs of bits and the cyclic nature of the comparison.
